# DIYCalcKit

> Free home improvement calculators, step-by-step project guides, and cost breakdowns for US homeowners. Covers painting, flooring, tiling, renovation, outdoor projects, and moving.

DIYCalcKit provides free, instant calculators that help homeowners estimate material quantities and project costs — no signup required. Each tool pairs with detailed cost guides and step-by-step project guides covering real 2026 pricing and practical DIY tips.

## Calculators

### Paint & Wall
- [Paint Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/paint-calculator.html): Calculates gallons of paint needed based on room dimensions, number of coats, and door/window deductions.
- [Paint Cost Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/paint-cost-calculator.html): Estimates total cost to paint a room including paint, primer, supplies, and optional professional labor.
- [Paint Coverage Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/paint-coverage-calculator.html): Calculates how far a gallon of paint covers, or how many gallons are needed for a specific area.
- [Primer Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/primer-calculator.html): Estimates primer coverage for walls and ceilings before painting.
- [Wallpaper Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/wallpaper-calculator.html): Calculates number of wallpaper rolls needed for a room, accounting for pattern repeat and waste.
- [Window Treatment Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/window-treatment-calculator.html): Calculates curtain panels, fabric yardage, or blind dimensions for any window — inside and outside mount.

### Flooring
- [Flooring Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/flooring-calculator.html): Calculates square footage and boxes of flooring needed for any room, with waste factor.
- [Tile Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/tile-calculator.html): Calculates number of tiles needed for floors or walls, including grout joint and waste allowance.
- [Grout Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/grout-calculator.html): Calculates exact bags of grout needed based on tile size, joint width, tile thickness, and grout type.
- [Carpet Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/carpet-calculator.html): Estimates square yards of carpet needed for a room, with seam and waste factored in.
- [Hardwood Floor Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/hardwood-floor-calculator.html): Calculates square footage and board count for hardwood flooring installation.

### Area & Structural
- [Room Area Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/room-area-calculator.html): Calculates room square footage for rectangular, L-shaped, and triangular rooms.
- [Square Footage Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/square-footage-calculator.html): Calculates total square footage for multiple rooms or an entire floor plan.
- [Drywall Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/drywall-calculator.html): Estimates number of drywall sheets needed for walls and ceilings.
- [Concrete Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/concrete-calculator.html): Calculates cubic yards or bags of concrete needed for slabs, footings, and posts.

### Renovation & Cost
- [Renovation Cost Estimator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/renovation-cost-estimator.html): Estimates home renovation costs by room type and scope of work.
- [Bathroom Remodel Cost Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/bathroom-remodel-cost-calculator.html): Estimates bathroom renovation cost by size, scope, finish level, and DIY vs. contractor.
- [Contractor Cost Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/contractor-cost-calculator.html): Estimates contractor labor costs based on project type and size.
- [Home Renovation ROI Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/home-renovation-roi-calculator.html): Calculates return on investment for common home improvement projects based on national averages.

### Garden & Outdoor
- [Raised Garden Bed Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/raised-garden-bed-calculator.html): Calculates soil, compost, and fill volume needed for any raised garden bed size and depth. Includes Mel's Mix breakdown.
- [Fence Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/fence-calculator.html): Calculates fence posts, panels, and materials needed for any fence length and style.
- [Deck Size Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/deck-size-calculator.html): Estimates lumber and materials needed for a deck build.
- [Deck Stain Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/stain-calculator.html): Calculates gallons of deck stain needed based on deck size, railings, number of coats, and wood condition.
- [Garden Area Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/garden-area-calculator.html): Calculates garden bed area for soil, mulch, or planting planning.
- [Mulch Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/mulch-calculator.html): Calculates cubic yards or bags of mulch needed based on bed dimensions and depth.
- [Gravel Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/gravel-calculator.html): Calculates cubic yards, tons, and bags of gravel for driveways, paths, and garden beds.
- [Soil Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/soil-calculator.html): Calculates cubic feet, cubic yards, and bags of soil for raised beds, planters, and garden beds.
- [Lawn Seed Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/lawn-seed-calculator.html): Calculates pounds of grass seed needed for new lawns or overseeding.

### Moving
- [Moving Cost Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/moving-cost-calculator.html): Estimates moving costs based on home size, distance, and service level.
- [Storage Unit Size Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/storage-unit-size-calculator.html): Recommends the right storage unit size based on what you need to store.
- [Packing Box Calculator](https://diycalckit.com/tools/packing-box-calculator.html): Estimates number of moving boxes needed by room count and home size.

## Project Guides

Step-by-step DIY project guides with built-in calculator links.

### Paint & Wall
- [How to Paint a Room](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-paint-a-room.html): Calculate materials, prep walls, prime, cut in, roll, and finish — complete guide.
- [How to Wallpaper a Room](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-wallpaper-a-room.html): Measure, order rolls, prep walls, hang, and finish — including pattern matching and corners.

### Flooring
- [How to Install LVP Flooring](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-install-lvp-flooring.html): Subfloor prep, acclimation, layout, click-lock installation, and transitions.
- [How to Install Hardwood Flooring](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-install-hardwood-flooring.html): Acclimation, subfloor prep, nail-down installation, and finishing.
- [How to Install Carpet](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-install-carpet.html): Tack strips, padding, cutting, stretching, and seaming.
- [How to Install Carpet Tiles](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-install-carpet-tiles.html): Layout, adhesive vs. peel-and-stick, cutting, and finishing.

### Tile
- [How to Tile a Floor](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-tile-a-floor.html): Substrate prep, layout, thinset, tile placement, grouting, and sealing.
- [How to Install a Backsplash](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-install-a-backsplash.html): Planning, adhesive, cutting around outlets, grouting, and sealing.
- [How to Grout Tile](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-grout-tile.html): Mixing, applying, cleaning, sealing, and fixing common problems.

### Structural
- [How to Install Drywall](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-install-drywall.html): Hanging, taping, mudding, sanding, and priming.
- [How to Pour a Concrete Slab](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-pour-a-concrete-slab.html): Site prep, forming, mixing, pouring, finishing, and curing.
- [How to Install Insulation](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-install-insulation.html): R-value guide, batt vs. blown-in, vapor barriers, and safety.

### Outdoor
- [How to Build a Fence](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-build-a-fence.html): Layout, post setting, panel installation, and gates.
- [How to Build a Deck](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-build-a-deck.html): Planning, permits, footings, framing, decking, railings, and finishing.
- [How to Stain a Deck](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-stain-a-deck.html): Cleaning, stripping, sanding, applying, and maintaining deck stain.
- [How to Build a Raised Garden Bed](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-build-a-raised-garden-bed.html): Materials, assembly, lining, filling with soil mix, and planting.
- [How to Lay Mulch](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-lay-mulch.html): Bed prep, depth guide, spreading, and maintenance.
- [How to Plan a Garden](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-plan-a-garden.html): Site selection, layout, soil prep, plant selection, and bed sizing.

### Moving & Renovation
- [How to Move House](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-move-house.html): Timeline, packing strategy, movers vs. DIY, and moving day guide.
- [How to Plan a Home Renovation](https://diycalckit.com/projects/how-to-plan-a-home-renovation.html): Scope, budget, permits, hiring contractors, and project management.

## Cost Guides & Blog

- [How Much Does a Gallon of Paint Cost? (2026 Price Guide)](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-does-a-gallon-of-paint-cost.html): Paint costs $20-$80/gallon on average, depending on brand and quality tier. Price by brand, finish, and can size.

- [How to Calculate Room Area for Flooring, Paint & Tile](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-to-calculate-room-area.html): Room area for any material — square feet for paint, square yards for carpet — plus L-shaped rooms and closets.
- [How to Measure a Garden Bed for Planning](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-to-measure-a-garden-bed.html): Rectangular, circular, and irregular bed measurement, and how area feeds into soil and mulch calculations.
- [How Much Hardwood Flooring Do I Need?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-hardwood-flooring-do-i-need.html): Waste allowance by installation pattern, plus bundle coverage guidance.
- [How Many Boxes Do I Need to Move?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-many-boxes-do-i-need-to-move.html): Box count by room and home size, with a box size and specialty box guide.
- [How Many Square Feet Does a Gallon of Paint Cover?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-many-square-feet-does-a-gallon-of-paint-cover.html): Standard coverage rate and what changes it — surface type, color change, application method.
- [How Much Fabric Do I Need for Curtains?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-fabric-do-i-need-for-curtains.html): Fullness ratio, length, and hem allowance calculations for curtain fabric.
- [How Much Grass Seed Do I Need to Reseed a Lawn?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-grass-seed-do-i-need.html): New seeding vs. overseeding rates by grass type, with timing guidance.
- [How Much Drywall Do I Need? Sheet Count Guide](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-drywall-do-i-need.html): Sheet count by room size, plus joint compound and tape quantities.
- [How Much Concrete Do I Need? Slab & Footing Calculator Guide](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-concrete-do-i-need.html): Cubic yard and bag count calculations for slabs, footings, and sidewalks.
- [How Much Does It Cost to Build a Deck in 2026?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-does-it-cost-to-build-a-deck.html): A 12x16 ft PT deck costs $4,800–$9,600 installed. Full breakdown by size and material.
- [How Much Does It Cost to Build a Fence in 2026?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-does-it-cost-to-build-a-fence.html): Wood privacy fence runs $15–$35 per linear foot installed. Breakdown by material and length.
- [What Size Storage Unit Do I Need?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/what-size-storage-unit-do-i-need.html): From 5x5 to 10x30 — what fits in each size, cost guide, and packing tips.
- [How Much Grout Do I Need? Complete Guide](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-grout-do-i-need.html): Coverage rates by tile size and joint width, sanded vs unsanded guide, and bag count reference.
- [How Much Does It Cost to Lay Flooring in 2026?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-does-it-cost-to-lay-flooring.html): LVP installs for $3.50–$10/sq ft; hardwood $9–$23/sq ft. Full breakdown by material.
- [How Much Carpet Do I Need?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-carpet-do-i-need.html): Waste factor, roll widths, seam placement, and cost by carpet type.
- [How Much Deck Stain Do I Need?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-deck-stain-do-i-need.html): Coverage rates by wood condition, coats, and railing factor — with quick-reference table.
- [How to Calculate Square Footage of a House](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-to-calculate-square-footage.html): Room-by-room measurement guide including L-shapes and what counts as livable sq ft.
- [How Much Does It Cost to Paint a Room in 2026?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-does-it-cost-to-paint-a-room.html): Pro painting runs $380–$790 per room; DIY materials $80–$150. Breakdown by room size.
- [How Much Does a Bathroom Renovation Cost in 2026?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-does-a-bathroom-renovation-cost.html): Mid-range remodel costs $10,000–$25,000. Full breakdown by scope and finishes.
- [How Much Does It Cost to Tile a Floor in 2026?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-does-it-cost-to-tile-a-floor.html): Tiling costs $7–$25 per sq ft installed. Breakdown by tile type and labor.
- [DIY vs. Hiring a Contractor: When to Do It Yourself](https://diycalckit.com/blog/diy-vs-hiring-a-contractor.html): Decision framework with cost comparisons for common home improvement projects.
- [10 Home Renovations That Add the Most Value in 2026](https://diycalckit.com/blog/home-renovations-that-add-the-most-value.html): Top ROI projects based on the 2025/2026 Cost vs. Value Report.
- [How Much Mulch Do I Need?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-mulch-do-i-need.html): Depth guide, bags vs. bulk pricing, and formula for calculating mulch quantity.
- [How to Calculate Flooring for Any Room](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-to-calculate-flooring-for-a-room.html): Step-by-step measurement guide for LVP, hardwood, tile, and carpet.
- [How Much Does It Cost to Move in 2026?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/moving-cost-guide.html): Local moves average $800–$2,500; cross-country $4,000–$10,000.
- [How Much Gravel Do I Need?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-gravel-do-i-need.html): Formula, depth guide, gravel types, and bags vs. bulk cost comparison.
- [How Much Does a Gravel Driveway Cost in 2026?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-does-a-gravel-driveway-cost.html): DIY $300–$1,500; installed $1,000–$3,000.
- [How Much Gravel Do I Need for a Garden Bed?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-gravel-for-garden-bed.html): Depth guide, gravel types, and bags vs. bulk cost for garden beds.
- [Gravel vs. Mulch for Garden Beds](https://diycalckit.com/blog/gravel-vs-mulch-for-garden-beds.html): Side-by-side comparison for drainage, weed suppression, cost, and plant types.
- [How to Build a Gravel Driveway](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-to-build-a-gravel-driveway.html): Materials, base prep, and gravel depth for DIY installation.
- [How Much Does It Cost to Wallpaper a Room in 2026?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-does-it-cost-to-wallpaper-a-room.html): Materials $300–$800, labor $300–$800. Breakdown by wallpaper type and room size.
- [How Many Rolls of Wallpaper Do I Need?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-many-rolls-of-wallpaper-do-i-need.html): Formula, pattern repeat guide, and quick reference table.
- [How Much Wallpaper for an Accent Wall?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-wallpaper-for-accent-wall.html): Roll count by wall size, pattern repeat impact, and peel-and-stick comparison.
- [How Much Soil Do I Need for a Raised Bed?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-soil-for-raised-bed.html): Cubic foot formula, bags vs. bulk cost, and soil depth by plant type.
- [Best Soil for Raised Garden Beds in 2026](https://diycalckit.com/blog/best-soil-for-raised-garden-beds.html): Raised bed soil vs. topsoil, DIY mixes, and bagged options with cost breakdown.
- [How Deep Should a Raised Garden Bed Be?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-deep-should-raised-garden-bed-be.html): Recommended depth by vegetable type and how depth affects soil cost.
- [How to Hang Wallpaper: Step-by-Step](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-to-hang-wallpaper.html): Wall prep, measuring, cutting, pasting, and finishing.
- [Wallpaper Calculator with Pattern Repeat](https://diycalckit.com/blog/wallpaper-calculator-with-repeat.html): How pattern repeat affects roll count, straight vs. drop match explained.
- [How Much Peel and Stick Wallpaper Do I Need?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/peel-and-stick-wallpaper-calculator.html): Coverage by roll type and comparison with traditional wallpaper.
- [How Much Primer Do I Need?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-much-primer-do-i-need.html): Coverage rates by surface type, coats guide, and room size reference.
- [Do I Need to Prime Before Painting?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/when-to-use-primer-before-painting.html): When primer is required, when to skip it, and which type to use.
- [How Many Coats of Primer Do I Need?](https://diycalckit.com/blog/how-many-coats-of-primer-do-i-need.html): One vs. two coats by surface type — bare drywall, stains, color changes, and wood.
